title: nodejs:24 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
nodejs
[1:24.4.1-1]
Initial import of nodejs:24

nodejs-nodemon
[3.0.3-1]
- Initial import into nodejs:24 module

nodejs-packaging
[2021.06-6]
- Properly handle @group/package deps in nodejs-symlink-deps
  Resolves: RHEL-121576
